title: PM Schema V2 UI Field Apparatus Workflow Prototype Design
objective: Define the first bounded field apparatus workflow prototype for PM Schema V2 using the governed apparatus-centric, offline-aware, controlled-mutation model without implementing runtime code, reopening PM schema design, or ratifying the final UI stack.
active_role: PM UI Field Apparatus Workflow Prototype Designer
constrained_outputs: One planning handoff note for the bounded field apparatus workflow prototype
One route and screen contract covering assignment queue, apparatus detail, queued mutation state, and sync-status behavior
One mutation classification summary for the bounded prototype actions showing what may queue offline and what must remain server-authoritative
Prototype acceptance criteria and explicit non-goals with no runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-001 remains bounded to prototype design for the field apparatus workflow and does not implement runtime code, routes, or component code
Confirm the packet preserves the governed mutation seam and does not assume direct client writes for controlled PM/work entities
Confirm the packet distinguishes queued offline capture from server-authoritative approval or finance-affecting finalization
Confirm the packet does not ratify the final UI stack beyond the currently approved-for-prototype directional tools
sql_permission_note: Planning only. Packet UI-001 does not authorize PM schema changes, runtime implementation, direct client mutation paths, or final stack ratification.
